info.title: Omni Datastream API
info.description: Agent-native SEC data plane API skeleton.

get.summary: Return OAuth protected resource metadata for hosted MCP and API clients
Return or proxy OAuth authorization server metadata for the configured WorkOS tenant
Return the current authenticated principal and organization context
Return the current organization profile
List operator-visible organizations with support-safe plan, usage, and recent activity summaries
Return an operator-facing organization snapshot with API keys, billing, usage, events, webhooks, streams, and delivery state
Return operator-scoped request diagnostics for a tenant request identifier
Return operator-scoped delivery aggregates for webhook and stream activity within a tenant

post.summary: Receive and process signed Stripe subscription lifecycle webhooks

get.summary: Return the current organization's Stripe customer, subscription, and effective plan state

post.summary: Create a Stripe Checkout session for a billable Omni Datastream plan
Create a Stripe Billing Portal session for the current organization

get.summary: List API keys for the current organization

post.summary: Create a new API key for the current organization

get.summary: List canonical event, webhook delivery, and stream records for the current organization
Export filtered canonical events as JSON or NDJSON for support and operations
Return request-id scoped diagnostics across usage, events, deliveries, streams, and artifacts
Return aggregated webhook and stream delivery summaries for support workflows
Return support-safe observability configuration and provider seam status
Return a support-safe observability export with config, usage, and recent events
List webhook endpoints for the current organization

post.summary: Create a signed webhook endpoint for artifact and stream events
Rotate the signing secret for a webhook endpoint

get.summary: List canonical delivery attempts for a webhook endpoint

post.summary: Replay a stored webhook delivery attempt by re-emitting its source event to the endpoint

get.summary: List stream subscriptions for the current organization

post.summary: Create a stream subscription for event polling and replay

get.summary: Poll canonical stream events for a subscription with cursor semantics
Resolve an entity by ticker, CIK, or name
Search the hot filing index by issuer, form, and free text
Retrieve the latest filing for an entity and form
Render the latest filing into Markdown-like text
Extract a section from the latest filing for an entity and form
Search hot filing sections and snippets by issuer, form, and free text
Return normalized SEC company facts for an issuer, concept, and optional form or unit
Return a normalized statement bundle backed by SEC company facts
Return a specific normalized statement bundle keyed by statement type
Return the latest normalized 13F ownership report for a manager CIK, with optional quarter-specific selection
List recent 13F filings, including quarter-end report dates, for a manager CIK

post.summary: Compare the latest two 13F ownership reports for a manager CIK

get.summary: Return recent normalized insider trading records derived from Form 4 filings
Return normalized executive compensation records derived from the latest DEF 14A filing

post.summary: Compare the latest two executive compensation disclosures for an issuer

get.summary: List canonical artifacts for the current organization

post.summary: Create and persist a derived artifact bundle

get.summary: Return artifact lifecycle counts by kind, status, and storage mode
Fetch persisted artifact metadata
Fetch the structured manifest for a persisted artifact
Export an artifact as structured JSON or a markdown-oriented download envelope
Download or redirect to the persisted artifact payload

post.summary: Reconcile artifact metadata with object storage and upload if needed
